segments.text: This is the tiniest 4K camera that I've ever used, and I got to test it out while mountain biking in Sedona,
Arizona. I'm Ethan, and I've shot with everything from professional rigs to iPhone cameras over the past decade. But this tiny Insta 360 Go Ultra, it
completely changes the way I think about POV content. This small modular camera is magnetic, shoots up to 4K 60fps, and
can mount anywhere. I stuck it on my helmet, I stuck it on trail signs, my car, and even on the ground between runs. It makes it so easy to create
content. These shots are all for Insta3's POV challenge, which has a $5,000 grand prize for your dream trip,
plus all different categories like the craziest POV, funniest POV, and best edited POV powered by Art List. Cuz really, after you get all these shots,
the best way to show off your footage is with good editing. And that's why I use Art List all the time. It has unlimited royalty-free music, sound effects, stock
footage, and the newest AI tools all in one platform. It's how I turn raw clips into engaging content. The challenge ends tomorrow, October 22nd. So, if you got some epic POV footage, post it now.
Make sure you tag Insta3 when you post. Okay, good luck.
